title: galium trifidum subsp. trifidum
intro: Galium trifidum subsp. trifidum, also known as the three-flowered bedstraw, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Galium trifidum subsp. trifidum include alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and pain associated with arthritis and other conditions. Galium trifidum subsp. trifidum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
